
---
title: "Redox resilience architecture figure"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: false
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
  echo: true
---

# Final figure

```{r setup}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.width = 12.6,
  fig.height = 16,
  dpi = 1000
)

```
 

```{r build-figure}
source("Redox_resilience.r")
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(png_file)
```

```{r show-figure, out.width='100%'}

fig_redox_resilience 


```
